Ketu, the body will be afflicted with lameness or paralysis.
A subject in whose chart Jupiter is in Lagna (Aquarius)
Saturn in the 7th and Mars in the 6th was paralysed in his
4th year. Based on a study of several horoscopes like the
above, we have observed that the following combinations
generally show a tendency to suffer from paralytic strokes :
(1) The Sun in Lagna afflicted by Saturn and Mars,
particularly in a sign ruling Pitta-humour.
* The Thridoshas, viz., Pitta (bile). Vatha (wind) and Sleshma
(phlegm) are represented by the twelve signs in an order. That is to say,
Aries rules Piita or bile, Taurus represents Vatha or wind and Gemini
signifies Sleshma or phlegm and so on. The Thridoshas are governed by
the different planets as follows :—
The Sun.—Mostly Pitta (bile) and a little of Vatha (wind).
The Moon.—Mostly Vatha (wind), and a little of Kapha (phlegm).
Mars.—Pitta (bile).

Concerning the Sixth House 285
